blockerReleaseConditions.set_platform_profile_links: All platform-profile-tracker.csv rows are marked set/live with valid /start/ campaign profile links.
blockerReleaseConditions.publish_first_batch: The first-batch posting-queue.csv platform rows are marked published and have post_url values.
blockerReleaseConditions.backfill_first_batch_kpis: At least the first-batch KPI rows have post_url or minimum KPI values for site_clicks, quiz_starts, and quiz_completions.

readinessPolicy.rule: YouTube profile link 設定完成後才發布首批；首批發布與 KPI 回填前維持空資料安全模式。

nextDecision: 可發布首批 YouTube Shorts；發布後立即回填 post_url 與最小 KPI。

platformChecklist.label: YouTube Shorts
platformChecklist.writeback: platform-profile-tracker.csv: status=set/live, profile_link_set_date, profile_clicks, site_clicks, quiz_starts, quiz_completions

firstBatchSchedule.label: YouTube Shorts
firstBatchSchedule.title: 他沉默時，你最想聽見哪一句話？
firstBatchSchedule.primaryCta: 完成 15 題測驗，找到你的情感守護者
firstBatchSchedule.writeback: posting-queue.csv: status=published, published_date, post_url; platform-kpi-tracker.csv: same platform row post_url, site_clicks, quiz_starts, quiz_completions; kpi-tracker.csv: script-level weekly rollup

blockers.message: 首批 1 個平台貼文尚未全部標記 published；沒有 post_url 前不能開始 KPI 判讀。
KPI 尚未回填到前 1 筆；保持測驗 CTA，不調整商品、Luna 或聯盟權重。
